Name: Credit Research Intern - 6 month Off-Cycle Internship
Company Description: TP ICAP is a UK-based interdealer broker and market infrastructure provider, facilitating trading in financial, energy, and commodities markets. Headquartered in London, it operates through platforms such as Tullett Prebon, ICAP, and Liquidnet, connecting banks, asset managers, and institutions across OTC and exchange-traded products. TP ICAP offers voice and electronic execution, data and analytics, and post-trade services. The firm plays a central role in global market liquidity, particularly in fixed income and derivatives, and continues to invest in electronic platforms and data solutions.

Name: Off-Cycle Internship, Primary Capital Advisory (Private Equity Fundraising)
Company Description: Houlihan Lokey is a global investment bank headquartered in Los Angeles, specialising in M&A advisory, capital markets, financial restructuring, and valuation services. The firm is widely recognised for its leading role in middle-market transactions and has consistently ranked as the top global M&A advisor by volume. In restructuring, Houlihan Lokey is a dominant player, often advising both creditors and debtors on high-profile bankruptcies and distressed situations. It also has one of the largest dedicated financial valuation teams globally, supporting litigation, tax, and financial reporting mandates. With offices across North America, Europe, the Middle East, and Asia-Pacific, the firm serves public and private companies, financial sponsors, and government entities. Houlihan Lokey’s sector coverage spans consumer, healthcare, tech, energy, and industrials, and it is particularly known for its rigorous analytics, high-touch advisory model, and long-term client relationships.

Name: Investor Relations Analyst Intern
Company Description: blisce/ is a growth-stage venture capital firm that focuses on investing in consumer-facing technology companies with a positive social or environmental impact. Founded in 2013 and based in Paris and New York, the firm provides capital and operational guidance to businesses across the United States and Europe. It prioritizes long-term partnerships with founders who aim to scale brands while maintaining a focus on transparency and ethical growth. The firm is known for its involvement in well-known consumer brands and its commitment to digital innovation.

Name: Stage Analyste en Capital Investissement
Company Description: IDIA Capital Investment is an investment firm focused on supporting the growth and development of companies through minority equity stakes. Founded as an initiative of the IDIA group, the firm targets established businesses that require capital for expansion, international development, or corporate restructuring. It operates with a focus on long term value creation and provides strategic support to management teams rather than seeking majority control. The firm primarily invests in mid market companies across various sectors, leveraging its industry network to foster industrial partnerships and sustainable growth.

Name: Technology M&A Analyst (Internship)

Founded in 2003 and based in Paris, the firm focuses on mergers and acquisitions, private placements, and corporate finance strategy. Clipperton is known for its deep expertise in the European tech ecosystem and its ability to guide companies through complex funding rounds and exit processes. It serves a diverse client base ranging from venture backed startups to established digital enterprises across various sectors including software, e-commerce, and fintech.

Name: Stage - Various Divisions
Company Description: HSBC is one of the world’s largest banking and financial services organisations, with operations in more than 60 countries and territories and headquarters in London. Founded in 1865 in Hong Kong and Shanghai, the bank provides services across retail banking, commercial banking, global banking and markets, and wealth management. HSBC is a major player in trade finance, emerging market banking, and cross-border financial services, with a strong focus on Asia, where it generates a large share of its revenue. The bank serves a diverse client base ranging from individuals and SMEs to multinational corporations and sovereign institutions. HSBC has committed to aligning its lending and investment portfolios with net-zero goals by 2050 and is actively involved in sustainable finance, digital banking, and financial inclusion. It continues to restructure its global footprint to focus on growth in Asia while streamlining less profitable operations elsewhere.

It is a market leader in M&A advisory, capital markets, trading, and research, serving corporate clients, financial sponsors, and governments worldwide. J.P. Morgan has a long history of innovation in financial services and is known for its global reach, balance sheet strength, and ability to execute complex, cross-border transactions. The firm plays a central role in capital allocation across public and private markets and continues to invest heavily in technology, digital banking, and sustainability initiatives. With a strong presence in London and across EMEA, it is a key player in European finance as well as global capital markets.

Known for its global platform and thematic investment approach, Partners Group identifies long-term trends—such as digitisation, decarbonisation, and demographic shifts—and invests in businesses that are positioned to benefit. The firm has a strong operational focus and often partners with portfolio companies to support scaling, sustainability, and value creation initiatives. It is headquartered in Zug, Switzerland, with offices across Europe, the Americas, and Asia-Pacific.

It is a part of the Allianz Group, a leading financial services provider.

Crédit Agricole is a leader in green finance and responsible investing, and it supports clients across Europe and internationally with a strong presence in agriculture, infrastructure, and export financing.

Founded in 1999 and headquartered in London, the firm provides M&A advisory, capital raising, and private investments through its growth equity funds. GP Bullhound operates in major tech hubs including San Francisco, Berlin, Stockholm, and Paris, and is known for its focus on high-growth entrepreneurs and founder-led businesses. Its investment banking arm has advised on some of Europe’s most notable tech transactions, while its asset management division backs fast-scaling companies through Series B and beyond. The firm also publishes highly regarded research on the global technology landscape and is active in hosting thought leadership events. GP Bullhound sits at the intersection of finance and innovation, helping European and US tech firms scale, internationalise, and access capital markets.

Name: Various Internships
Company Description: AXA is a global insurance and asset management company headquartered in Paris, offering services in life, health, property, and casualty insurance, as well as wealth and investment products. The company has grown through acquisitions and organic expansion, with a focus on risk mitigation and financial protection across individuals and businesses. Name: Quantitative Researcher - Intern
Company Description: Point72 is a global asset management firm founded by Steven A. Cohen in 2014, following the transition from SAC Capital. Headquartered in Stamford, Connecticut, the firm manages capital across multiple strategies including long/short equity, macro, systematic, and private investments. Its discretionary investing teams operate with autonomy within a multi-manager platform, while its Cubist division focuses on quantitative and algorithmic trading. Point72 also runs a venture capital arm, Point72 Ventures, investing in fintech, healthcare, and enterprise technology. With offices in major financial centres including New York, London, Tokyo, and Singapore, the firm is known for its strong emphasis on data, technology, and talent development, particularly through its structured analyst training programs like the Point72 Academy.

Name: Off-cycle M&A 6-month Internship
Company Description: Greenhill is an independent investment bank focused on M&A, restructuring, and capital advisory services for corporations, financial sponsors, and governments. Founded in 1996 and headquartered in New York, the firm operates globally with offices in North America, Europe, Asia, and Latin America. Greenhill is known for its conflict-free model, avoiding lending or trading activities to offer clients fully independent strategic advice. It has advised on a wide range of high-profile transactions across sectors including financial services, healthcare, infrastructure, and consumer goods. The firm also maintains a strong presence in restructuring advisory, including both creditor and debtor-side mandates. Greenhill’s lean structure and senior-led execution model appeal to clients seeking discretion and deep expertise. In 2023, it was acquired by Mizuho Financial Group, enabling it to maintain independence while gaining greater access to global capital markets.

With a reputation for high-touch client service and deal execution, it remains a go-to firm for high-growth companies and active sponsors.

Name: 2027 Private Equity Intern

The firm pioneered the leveraged buyout model and remains highly active in buyouts, growth equity, and platform investments across sectors and geographies. KKR also invests heavily in impact strategies and ESG-aligned portfolios, while its credit division is one of the largest non-bank lenders globally. With a global footprint and a strong operator-focused investment approach, KKR combines capital, operational expertise, and strategic partnerships to drive long-term value creation across public and private markets.

Company Description: Altman Solon is a global strategy consulting firm focused exclusively on the telecommunications, media, and technology (TMT) sectors. Formed through the 2020 merger of Altman Vilandrie & Company and Solon Management Consulting, the firm brings deep industry insight, analytical rigor, and strategic clarity to corporate and investor clients. With offices in North America, Europe, Asia, and Latin America, Altman Solon advises on growth strategy, due diligence, digital transformation, and organizational design, serving many of the world's leading TMT companies and private equity firms.

Name: 2027 - M&A Internship
Company Description: Lazard is a global financial advisory and asset management firm known for its independent, client-centric approach to M&A, restructuring, capital markets, and investment strategy. Headquartered in New York and Paris, the firm operates across more than 40 countries and serves corporations, governments, and institutional investors. Lazard’s financial advisory division is one of the most prestigious in the world, regularly advising on complex, high-value transactions, activist defence, and strategic reviews. Its asset management arm offers a broad range of strategies across equities, fixed income, and alternatives, with a strong presence in fundamental research and emerging markets. With roots dating back to the 19th century, Lazard is known for its discretion, deep bench of senior advisers, and emphasis on long-term client relationships across sectors and regions.

Name: Internship - Real Estate Investment
Company Description: Schroders is a UK-based global asset manager with a history dating back over 200 years. Headquartered in London, it manages assets across equities, fixed income, multi-asset, private markets, and alternatives for institutional, intermediary, and retail clients worldwide. Schroders is known for its active investment approach, global reach, and strong ESG integration across strategies. The firm has made significant investments in sustainable investing, impact solutions, and private asset capabilities, particularly through its Schroders Capital division. With operations in more than 30 countries, it plays a leading role in shaping responsible investing practices globally.

Name: 2027 Off-Cycle Internship
Company Description: Eastdil Secured is a leading real estate investment banking firm advising on complex, high-value transactions including investment sales, recapitalisations, debt placements, and joint ventures. Headquartered in New York, it serves institutional investors, REITs, developers, and sovereign wealth funds. The firm is known for its deep market intelligence, longstanding client relationships, and advisory-driven approach in sectors like office, hospitality, logistics, and multifamily. Eastdil bridges commercial real estate expertise with capital markets execution.

Name: Internship - Investment Team
Company Description: Antin Infrastructure Partners is a leading independent private equity firm focused on infrastructure investments. With several funds raised since its inception, Antin targets investments in energy, transportation, telecom, and social infrastructure sectors. Headquartered in Paris, the firm primarily invests in developed markets across Europe, North America, and Asia-Pacific. Antin aims to create long-term value through active portfolio management and operational improvements in essential infrastructure assets.

Name: Various Internships
Company Description: Kroll is a global risk and financial advisory firm headquartered in New York, providing services in investigations, compliance, cyber security, valuations, and corporate finance. Known historically for its forensic investigations and intelligence gathering, Kroll has evolved into a multidisciplinary adviser for clients navigating fraud, litigation, governance, and data risk. The firm supports corporates, governments, law firms, and financial institutions in managing reputational, operational, and financial challenges, often in high-stakes or crisis scenarios. Kroll also operates as a major provider of independent valuation and fairness opinions for transactions, tax reporting, and litigation support. With a growing presence in cyber defence and ESG advisory, Kroll continues to expand its offerings at the intersection of technology, finance, and security.

Name: 2027 Off-cycle Internship Program
Company Description: BlackRock is the world’s largest asset manager, overseeing trillions in assets across index funds, ETFs, active strategies, and alternatives. Founded in 1988 and headquartered in New York, the firm serves institutional, corporate, and retail investors worldwide. Its product suite includes iShares, the world’s most widely used ETF platform, and Aladdin, its proprietary risk and portfolio management system. BlackRock plays a major role in global capital markets, with influence over long-term investment trends, ESG integration, and financial technology innovation.

Name: M&A Internship (January 2027)
Company Description: Lincoln International is a global mid-market investment bank headquartered in Chicago, providing M&A advisory, debt advisory, and valuation services to private equity firms, public companies, and privately held businesses. The firm has a strong presence in both sell-side and buy-side mandates across industrials, business services, healthcare, consumer, and tech sectors. With offices across the Americas, Europe, and Asia, Lincoln operates a globally integrated model, ensuring seamless cross-border execution. It is known for its focus on founder-led and sponsor-backed companies, and often supports clients through complex sale processes, recapitalisations, and strategic growth transactions. The firm combines strong sector knowledge with execution capability and has built a reputation for consistent results in the global middle market.

Name: 2027 - Investment Banking Off Cycle Internship
Company Description: Nomura is a Japanese multinational financial services group headquartered in Tokyo, with operations in investment banking, asset management, and retail brokerage. The firm serves corporates, governments, and institutional clients globally, offering advisory, capital markets, and trading services. Nomura is a market leader in Asia and maintains a growing presence in EMEA and the Americas, with particular strengths in structured finance, macro trading, and cross-border dealmaking. It also provides a wide range of public and private market investment strategies through Nomura Asset Management. The firm blends domestic scale with international ambition, and is actively investing in digital platforms and sustainability-led finance.

Name: 2026 - M&A Internship
Company Description: Lazard is a global financial advisory and asset management firm known for its independent, client-centric approach to M&A, restructuring, capital markets, and investment strategy. Headquartered in New York and Paris, the firm operates across more than 40 countries and serves corporations, governments, and institutional investors. Lazard’s financial advisory division is one of the most prestigious in the world, regularly advising on complex, high-value transactions, activist defence, and strategic reviews. Its asset management arm offers a broad range of strategies across equities, fixed income, and alternatives, with a strong presence in fundamental research and emerging markets. With roots dating back to the 19th century, Lazard is known for its discretion, deep bench of senior advisers, and emphasis on long-term client relationships across sectors and regions.

Name: Intern, Transactions
Company Description: LaSalle Investment Management is a global real estate investment manager and subsidiary of JLL, managing capital on behalf of institutional and retail investors. Headquartered in Chicago with offices worldwide, LaSalle offers strategies across core, value-add, and opportunistic real estate, as well as debt and indirect investments. The firm operates in both public and private markets and has deep capabilities across property sectors including logistics, residential, office, and retail. LaSalle is known for its research-driven investment process, disciplined risk management, and focus on long-term value creation through active asset management. ESG is fully integrated into its investment approach, and the firm is an active participant in industry sustainability initiatives. With over $80 billion in assets under management, LaSalle is one of the most prominent institutional real estate managers globally.

Name: 2026 Sales & Trading Off-Cycle Internship
Company Description: Morgan Stanley is a global financial services firm headquartered in New York, offering investment banking, wealth management, institutional securities, and asset management services. With a strong presence in both the US and international markets, the firm advises clients on mergers and acquisitions, IPOs, debt and equity financing, and strategic investments. Its institutional arm is active in trading, research, and capital markets, while its wealth management division, bolstered by the acquisition of E*TRADE, serves millions of clients globally. Morgan Stanley is widely regarded for its advisory work with corporates and financial sponsors, and it continues to invest in digital platforms, sustainability, and global expansion to maintain its position as one of the world’s top financial institutions.

Name: Off-Cycle Internship - Telecoms Team (January - June 2027)
Company Description: Evercore is a premier global independent investment banking advisory firm, known for advising on complex M&A, capital markets, restructuring, and strategic transactions. Headquartered in New York and founded in 1995, Evercore operates across major financial centres in the Americas, Europe, and Asia. The firm is consistently ranked among the top M&A advisers globally, having advised on some of the largest and most transformative deals in recent decades. Evercore focuses exclusively on advisory—without lending or trading conflicts—positioning itself as a trusted, conflict-free partner to boards, CEOs, and private equity sponsors. The firm also provides institutional equity research and sells insights through its equities division. Known for its talent density, discretion, and analytical rigour, Evercore competes with top-tier Wall Street banks while maintaining an independent, client-focused culture.

Name: Tech Growth Private Equity - Analyst Intern - September 2026
Company Description: InfraVia Capital Partners is a Paris-based private investment firm founded in 2008 that specialises in infrastructure, real assets, and growth-stage technology investments. The firm deploys large scale equity capital in sectors shaped by digital transformation, decarbonisation, urbanisation, mobility, health, and essential services. InfraVia partners closely with management teams, entrepreneurs, and industrial businesses to support strategic international expansion, operational improvement, ESG integration, and long-term value creation across Europe and beyond.

Name: Private Equity Internship - Astorg MidCap
Company Description: Astorg is a European private equity firm focused on backing founder-led and family-owned businesses. Headquartered in Paris with offices across Europe and the US, the firm invests in companies with strong market positions, particularly in healthcare, software, and advanced manufacturing. Astorg works closely with management teams and avoids overleveraging, often retaining significant stakes in its portfolio companies over time. It has built a reputation for a thoughtful and independent approach to investing.

Name: 2027 Global Client Solutions - Sales Support FIBI Internship
Company Description: KKR (Kohlberg Kravis Roberts & Co.) is a global investment firm headquartered in New York, known for its leadership in private equity and expansion into asset classes including credit, real estate, infrastructure, and insurance. Founded in 1976, KKR manages over $500 billion in assets and serves institutional investors, family offices, and sovereign wealth funds. The firm pioneered the leveraged buyout model and remains highly active in buyouts, growth equity, and platform investments across sectors and geographies. KKR also invests heavily in impact strategies and ESG-aligned portfolios, while its credit division is one of the largest non-bank lenders globally. With a global footprint and a strong operator-focused investment approach, KKR combines capital, operational expertise, and strategic partnerships to drive long-term value creation across public and private markets.

Name: Private Equity - Investor Relations and ESG - Internship
Company Description: InfraVia Capital Partners is a Paris-based private investment firm founded in 2008 that specialises in infrastructure, real assets, and growth-stage technology investments. The firm deploys large scale equity capital in sectors shaped by digital transformation, decarbonisation, urbanisation, mobility, health, and essential services. InfraVia partners closely with management teams, entrepreneurs, and industrial businesses to support strategic international expansion, operational improvement, ESG integration, and long-term value creation across Europe and beyond.

Name: 6-Month Off-Cycle Internship - Capital Solutions - Debt Advisory
Company Description: Houlihan Lokey is a global investment bank headquartered in Los Angeles, specialising in M&A advisory, capital markets, financial restructuring, and valuation services. The firm is widely recognised for its leading role in middle-market transactions and has consistently ranked as the top global M&A advisor by volume. In restructuring, Houlihan Lokey is a dominant player, often advising both creditors and debtors on high-profile bankruptcies and distressed situations. It also has one of the largest dedicated financial valuation teams globally, supporting litigation, tax, and financial reporting mandates. With offices across North America, Europe, the Middle East, and Asia-Pacific, the firm serves public and private companies, financial sponsors, and government entities. Houlihan Lokey’s sector coverage spans consumer, healthcare, tech, energy, and industrials, and it is particularly known for its rigorous analytics, high-touch advisory model, and long-term client relationships.

Name: 6-Month Stage - Paris
Company Description: Ardian is a private investment house headquartered in Paris, managing assets across private equity, infrastructure, real estate, and private credit. Originally founded in 1996 as the private equity arm of AXA, it became independent in 2013 and has since grown into one of Europe’s largest private markets investors. Ardian operates through a network of offices worldwide and backs businesses at multiple stages, from buyouts to growth investments. The firm is also active in secondaries and co-investments and has built a strong reputation around investor alignment and ESG integration.

Name: 2027 Investment Banking Off-Cycle Internship
Company Description: Morgan Stanley is a global financial services firm headquartered in New York, offering investment banking, wealth management, institutional securities, and asset management services. With a strong presence in both the US and international markets, the firm advises clients on mergers and acquisitions, IPOs, debt and equity financing, and strategic investments. Its institutional arm is active in trading, research, and capital markets, while its wealth management division, bolstered by the acquisition of E*TRADE, serves millions of clients globally. Morgan Stanley is widely regarded for its advisory work with corporates and financial sponsors, and it continues to invest in digital platforms, sustainability, and global expansion to maintain its position as one of the world’s top financial institutions.

Name: Intern Trainee - Primary Ratings Structured Finance
Company Description: Scope Group is a leading European provider of independent credit ratings, research, and data services. Founded in 2002 and based in Berlin, Germany, it specialises in assessing financial institutions, corporate issuers, project finance, and structured finance, serving investors and market participants with transparent insights. Scope is known for its distinct European perspective, commitment to methodological transparency, and efforts to promote competition in the rating industry. It combines rigorous analytical frameworks with in depth market knowledge to deliver unbiased opinions and enhance financial market stability.

Name: Intern - Front-Office Credit Analyst - Maritime Structured Finance
Company Description: Sumitomo Mitsui Banking Corporation (SMBC) is a major Japanese bank and part of the SMBC Group, offering a broad range of corporate, investment, and retail banking services. Headquartered in Tokyo, SMBC has a global presence, particularly in Asia, the Americas, and EMEA. The bank provides services in project finance, trade finance, syndicated lending, and capital markets, with a strong reputation in infrastructure and energy financing. It works with multinational corporates, financial institutions, and public sector entities, and has expanded its footprint in sustainable finance, ESG advisory, and cross-border investment solutions.

Name: Long-Term Internship 2027
Company Description: Rothschild & Co. is a multinational financial advisory group with deep roots in European banking, offering services in M&A, wealth management, and asset management. Headquartered in Paris and London, the firm is especially renowned for its independent M&A advisory, supporting corporates, governments, and institutions on high-profile, often cross-border, transactions. It also advises families and entrepreneurs through its private wealth arm and manages funds for institutional clients. Known for discretion, relationship depth, and long-term perspective, Rothschild & Co. operates with a global footprint while preserving a culture of stability and trust rooted in its family heritage.
